articles.title: Noah Kahan Becomes a Star and It Messes with His Head
articles.summary: Noah Kahan is a singer from Vermont who became famous very quickly. He writes songs about feeling lonely and not fitting in. Many people love his music, especially on TikTok. He even got a big boost when singer Olivia Rodrigo sang one of his songs. But being famous is hard for Noah. He feels scared that his success might go away. He also jokes a lot, even about silly things like bathroom humor. His fans like his funny posts. Even though he is a big star now, he still feels nervous and unsure. This article tells us that becoming famous can be exciting but also scary.

articles.title: Boulter and Venus Williams Team Up in Madrid
articles.summary: Katie Boulter from Britain played tennis with Venus Williams in Madrid. Venus Williams is a very famous tennis player who has won many big tournaments. They played together for the first time and won their first match. They beat a team from China. Now they will play against a team from Taiwan and the USA. Katie was nervous before the match, but Venus helped her feel calm. They had fun and smiled while playing. Venus is older than Katie, but they played well together. Katie is getting married later this year, and Venus gave her advice about enjoying the wedding. In another match, a top player named Iga Swiatek had to stop playing because she was sick.

articles.title: Scientists Create Swirling Light Tornadoes
articles.summary: Scientists have made light spin like a tiny tornado. They used a special material called a liquid crystal, which is like a liquid but with molecules arranged in order. Inside this material, they created tiny structures called torons, which look like twisted spirals. These torons can trap light and make it spin. This spinning light is called an optical vortex. The scientists also used mirrors to make the light bounce back and forth, making the spinning stronger. They can even control the size of the light trap with electricity. This new way to make spinning light is important because it could help build better devices for sending information, like in quantum communication. The best part is that this spinning light happens in the lowest energy state, which means it is very stable and easy to use. This discovery could lead to smaller and simpler light sources for future technologies.

articles.title: A Tiny Particle That Helps Explain Why Things Have Mass
articles.summary: Everything around us has mass, but scientists are still trying to understand why. Mass is what makes things heavy or light. A new experiment found a rare particle called an η′ meson that can get stuck inside an atom's nucleus. This helps scientists learn how mass is made. The experiment used a big machine called a particle accelerator to smash protons into carbon. They used special detectors to see the particle. The results show that the particle's mass changes when it is inside the nucleus. This is important because it gives clues about how all matter gets its mass. Scientists hope to learn more about the vacuum, which is not empty but full of energy. This discovery is a big step in understanding the universe.

articles.title: How Space Ripples Might Have Made Dark Matter
articles.summary: Scientists have a new idea about how dark matter was made. Dark matter is a mysterious substance that makes up most of the universe, but we can't see it. The new idea says that ripples in space, called gravitational waves, might have helped create dark matter. These ripples happened right after the Big Bang, when the universe was very young. The ripples turned into tiny particles that later became dark matter. This is important because we don't know what dark matter is made of. If this idea is correct, it could help us understand the universe better. The scientists who came up with this idea are Professor Joachim Kopp and Dr. Azadeh Maleknejad. They published their study in a science journal called Physical Review Letters. They plan to do more calculations to see if their idea is right. This research might solve one of the biggest mysteries in science.

articles.title: Funny Statue for Terry Jones
articles.summary: A statue of Terry Jones, a funny actor from the Monty Python comedy group, will be shown in Colwyn Bay, Wales, where he was born. Terry Jones died in 2020 at age 77 from a rare brain disease. The statue shows him as a funny character: a naked man playing an organ. His friend Michael Palin said Terry would think the statue is very funny. Many famous people helped raise money for the statue, and they got enough money in six months. The sculptor worked very hard for a year and a half to make the statue perfect. The statue also includes a desk with books because Terry wrote history books too. People will see the statue on Saturday near the beach.
